post.description: Register a new user
Login and get access token
Exchange a verified Apple identity token for app JWTs.
Refresh access token. Send JSON body: {"refresh_token": "<token>"}.
Revoke refresh/access tokens server-side when provided.
Request a password reset email. Always returns the same message (anti-enumeration).
Set a new password using a single-use reset token.

get.description: Deprecated: use GET /api/v1/user/me instead.
Full-text-style search by team name or abbreviation (Weakness #37).

List allowed league codes and labels for filters and favorites.
Use in query params: league= or leagues= (comma-separated).
Get games with predictions. Without date: future scheduled only. With date: all games that local calendar day.

parameters.name: date

schema.description: Calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD). With time_zone, that day in the user's zone; without it, UTC midnight–midnight. Includes scheduled, live, and finished on that day.
schema.title: Date

parameters.description: Calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD). With time_zone, that day in the user's zone; without it, UTC midnight–midnight. Includes scheduled, live, and finished on that day.

parameters.name: time_zone

schema.description: IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York). Use with date so the day matches the device calendar.
schema.title: Time Zone

parameters.description: IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York). Use with date so the day matches the device calendar.

get.description: Get game details with prediction
Get explainability for the latest prediction (top factors, confidence, model info).
Model-projected player props for a game. Premium only; not sportsbook lines.

Read-only consensus sportsbook lines for model comparison (M-01 spike).
Requires CLEARSPORTS_API_KEY (or optional ODDS_API_KEY). Informational only — not betting advice.
Live win-probability for premium users. In-play v0 when game is live and model was refreshed after kickoff.
Get prediction for a game (requires authentication)

post.description:
Generate share content for this game's pick: text message and optional share graphic (base64 PNG).
Pick confidence is only included when the caller is allowed to view that prediction
(signed-in + free-tier quota, or premium).

get.description: Get current user information

delete.description:
Permanently delete the current user and all associated data (GDPR right to erasure).
Cancels Stripe subscriptions and removes the RevenueCat subscriber when configured.
Favorites, prediction history, push tokens, and reminder records are removed.
The session is invalid after this.

get.description: Get user's favorite teams and leagues (with team details expanded).

post.description: Add team to favorites.
Add league to favorites. League code is case-insensitive (e.g. nfl, NFL).

delete.description: Remove league from favorites. League code is case-insensitive.

get.description: Get user's prediction viewing history (paginated, most recent first).

post.description: Register an Expo (or other) push token for this user. Body: {"token": "ExponentPushToken[xxx]"}.

delete.description: Remove push token(s). Query ?token=ExponentPushToken[xxx] to remove one; no query to remove all for user.

parameters.name: token

schema.description: ExponentPushToken[xxx] to remove one; omit to remove all
schema.title: Token

parameters.description: ExponentPushToken[xxx] to remove one; omit to remove all

get.description: GDPR Article 20 — portable export of account data (JSON).

post.description: CCPA — record do-not-sell/opt-out preference (we do not sell PII; audit trail).

get.description: Referral invite code (user id) for share links.

post.description: Attach referrer on first apply (Imp #42 partial — tracking; bonus via ASC/Stripe).

get.description:
Historical accuracy for finished games with a stored pre_game prediction.

Public endpoint (no auth) for transparency. Live in-play refreshes (inplay_v0) are
excluded; each game uses the first pre-kickoff row. See `methodology` for scoring rules.
Includes rolling 30-day window and confidence-bucket breakdown.

Reliability diagram: predicted outcome probability vs actual hit rate in decile buckets.
Chart is shown in-app when total_scored >= min_sample (100).

Public model readiness snapshot from metrics.json (warming vs ready to publish).
When artifacts are missing or publish_ready is false, inference uses heuristic fallback.

Third-party accuracy audit bundle (Imp #94): accuracy, calibration, model readiness.
Stable JSON for external reviewers — no auth required.

Model accuracy vs live market consensus on upcoming games (I64).
Display-only — supports web dashboard and in-app transparency.

Informational snapshot of which leagues have standings data in DB (partial coverage transparency).
Expands as licensed feeds and sync jobs grow.

Top picks: games with predictions, ordered by confidence (high first) then kickoff.
Without date: legacy window — scheduled only, from now through end of server local calendar day.
With date (+ optional time_zone): same UTC window as GET /games/upcoming for that day.
Public; if user is free and over daily limit, predictions are omitted.

parameters.name: league

schema.description: Filter by single league (alias for leagues=)
schema.title: League

parameters.description: Filter by single league (alias for leagues=)

parameters.name: date

schema.description: Calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD). With time_zone, same local day as /games/upcoming; includes scheduled, live, and finished.
schema.title: Date

parameters.description: Calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD). With time_zone, same local day as /games/upcoming; includes scheduled, live, and finished.

parameters.name: time_zone

schema.description: IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York). Use with date for soccer/model alignment.
schema.title: Time Zone

parameters.description: IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York). Use with date for soccer/model alignment.

get.description:
Personalized feed for Home "Best Picks for You".
Logged-in users with favorites see favorite-team games first, then favorite leagues,
then other high-confidence picks. Guests fall back to top-picks ordering.

parameters.name: league

schema.description: Filter by single league (alias for leagues=)
schema.title: League

parameters.description: Filter by single league (alias for leagues=)

parameters.name: date

schema.description: Calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD). With time_zone, same local day as /games/upcoming.
schema.title: Date

parameters.description: Calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD). With time_zone, same local day as /games/upcoming.

schema.description: IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York). Use with date for soccer/model alignment.
schema.title: Time Zone

get.description: Games with model-projected player props (Premium). For Games tab Props view.

parameters.name: league

schema.description: Filter by single league (alias for leagues=)
schema.title: League

parameters.description: Filter by single league (alias for leagues=)

get.description:
Leaderboard: users ranked by accuracy of finished games they viewed (prediction vs outcome).
period: weekly (last 7 days), monthly (last 30 days), or all (no time filter).
List challenges created by the current user (Pro only).

post.description: Create a new challenge with the given game_ids (Pro only). Games must exist and be scheduled.

get.description: Get one challenge by id (must be creator; Pro only).

post.description:
Create a Stripe Checkout Session for Premium or Pro (premium_plus).
Premium includes a 7-day trial in code; Pro has no trial here (set trials on the Price in Stripe if needed).
Returns { url } to open in Stripe Checkout.

Stripe Customer Portal — manage subscription, payment method, cancel (Weakness #47).
Requires stripe_customer_id on user (set after first checkout).

Stripe webhook: on checkout.session.completed, set user subscription_tier from session metadata.
Register POST /api/v1/subscription/webhook in Stripe (HTTPS origin where this API is exposed).

RevenueCat webhook: keep `subscription_tier` in sync with store entitlements.
Configure in RevenueCat dashboard with the same Authorization header value as
REVENUECAT_WEBHOOK_AUTH. The app sets RevenueCat `app_user_id` to the backend
user id, so events map directly to a user.
Accept batched ad session metrics from the mobile app (logged server-side).

Informational correlation warnings for multi-leg slips (I66).
Guests and signed-in users may call; no wagering implied.

Run game-starting, high-confidence, and post-game push triggers. Call from cron with header:
X-Cron-Secret: <PUSH_CRON_SECRET>

High-frequency pipeline when games are live: refresh provider scores for active leagues,
then re-run ML with inplay_v0 tagging (cooldown min_minutes_live). No-op when nothing is live.
Schedule every 1–2 minutes via scripts/cron/internal_live_sync_run.sh.

Refresh ML predictions for live + upcoming games. Schedule via cron every 15–60 minutes with header:
X-Cron-Secret: <PUSH_CRON_SECRET>

Set EXPLANATION_MODEL_DIR or MODEL_ARTIFACT_DIR to a folder with simple_model.pkl + feature_columns.pkl
for sklearn inference; otherwise a deterministic heuristic runs from game state.

Retrain the win-probability model from finished games and write sklearn artifacts.
Schedule weekly (after standings + results sync) with X-Cron-Secret.

Writes simple_model.pkl + feature_columns.pkl + metrics.json to out_dir
(MODEL_ARTIFACT_DIR / EXPLANATION_MODEL_DIR, or body.out_dir). In Docker the
API mount at /models is read-only — use scripts/cron/internal_train_model.sh
on the host to write into ml/models, or pass a writable out_dir here.

put.description:
Replace all performer spotlight rows for a game (ETL / admin). Same auth as cron:
X-Cron-Secret: <PUSH_CRON_SECRET>

delete.description: Remove all spotlight rows for a game.

post.description:
For each configured soccer league: import fixtures into `teams`/`games`, then upsert `team_standings`.
Uses ClearSports when CLEARSPORTS_API_KEY is set and Sportradar is not; otherwise Sportradar season feeds.
After sync, run POST /internal/predictions/run.

Import NFL and NBA schedules from ClearSports (CLEARSPORTS_API_KEY required).
Then POST /internal/predictions/run.

M-07: Sync 2+ seasons per league from ClearSports (CLEARSPORTS_API_KEY).
Idempotent upserts; returns decisive finished-game counts per league.
Schedule weekly or run once after deploy. Optionally chain predictions for backtest labels.

get.description:
Verify Sportradar NFL and (optionally) soccer standings can be fetched (same X-Cron-Secret).
Does not persist data; uses the same caches as explanation enrichment.
Verify ClearSports API key (EPL games probe) and soccer feed when key is the active provider.

post.description: Enqueue background work (Redis list; Imp #52).
Dequeue and return one job for worker processing.
Send daily picks email when FEATURE_EMAIL_DIGEST=true and SMTP configured.

get.description: Health check endpoint
Readiness check: DB must be reachable. Redis is optional (skipped if REDIS_URL is empty).

CreateCheckoutBody.title: CreateCheckoutBody
CreateCheckoutBody.description: Maps to app tiers: premium → Premium, premium_plus → Pro.

seasons_back.title: Seasons Back
seasons_back.description: Number of prior seasons to sync in addition to the current season (e.g. 2 → 3 seasons total).

leagues.title: Leagues
leagues.description: Optional league filter (e.g. ['nfl','nba','premier_league']). Default: all configured leagues.

min_decisive_target.title: Min Decisive Target
min_decisive_target.description: Report leagues with at least this many decisive finished games in DB.

run_predictions.title: Run Predictions
run_predictions.description: After sync, run prediction job on recently finished games (see include_recent_finished_days).

include_recent_finished_days.title: Include Recent Finished Days
include_recent_finished_days.description: When run_predictions=true, backfill predictions for finished games in the last N days.

HistoricalBackfillBody.title: HistoricalBackfillBody
HistoricalBackfillBody.description: M-07: ingest prior seasons of finished games for training / backtest.

include_recent_finished_days.title: Include Recent Finished Days
include_recent_finished_days.description: Backfill pre-kickoff predictions on finished games in the last N days (accuracy/calibration).

ReplacePlayerSpotlightsBody.title: ReplacePlayerSpotlightsBody
ReplacePlayerSpotlightsBody.description: Full replace: existing rows for this game are deleted, then these are inserted.

RichAnalysisSections.title: RichAnalysisSections
RichAnalysisSections.description: Optional narrative sections from job pipeline, DB context, and generated scenarios.

StructuredGameAnalysis.title: StructuredGameAnalysis
StructuredGameAnalysis.description: Tabular / card-friendly breakdown; narrative remains in rich_analysis.

out_dir.title: Out Dir
out_dir.description: Directory for simple_model.pkl + feature_columns.pkl + metrics.json. Defaults to MODEL_ARTIFACT_DIR / EXPLANATION_MODEL_DIR.

min_publish_holdout_per_league_group.title: Min Publish Holdout Per League Group
min_publish_holdout_per_league_group.description: Min decisive corpus games per league group before writing pickles (default from settings).

force.title: Force
force.description: Train even when usable games < min_games.

TrainModelBody.title: TrainModelBody
TrainModelBody.description: Train sklearn artifacts from finished games in the DB.
